prerequisites: An UpPromote account with the affiliate marketing app installed on your store, with access to Settings > Integrations to retrieve the API key.
An UpPromote Public API v2 API key (an opaque secret string) generated from the app's Integrations settings.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which to replicate records.

authMethods.name: API key (Authorization header)
authMethods.summary: UpPromote Public API v2 authenticates with an API key. Every request must include the key in the Authorization header as 'Authorization: <YOUR_API_KEY>'. The key is an opaque string with no OAuth or Bearer prefix; requests without a valid key are rejected. Provide this value in the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Generate your UpPromote API key
setupSteps.body: Open the UpPromote app and go to Settings > Integrations, then scroll down to find the API Key section. Select Get API Key and copy the generated key. Treat it like a password: store it securely and rotate it periodically.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied key in the connector's api_key field. The connector sends it on every request to the UpPromote Public API v2 base URL https://aff-api.uppromote.com/api/v2 over HTTPS, using the Authorization header for authentication.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which records should be synced. The connector uses this as the lower bound for pulling data from UpPromote.

sources.title: UpPromote Public API v2 reference (Authentication, API key, Base URLs)
